_meta.experiment: Frontier K2+distill vs K3-PTQ — consolidated across 3 models / 3 families, multi-benchmark

verdict: K3-PTQ > K2+distill is ROBUST cross-family + multi-benchmark: K3-PTQ beats K2+distill on GSM8K 3/3 models, ARC 3/3, HellaSwag 2/3 (Qwen3 ties within noise). The third ternary plane (~4.9bpw) dominates the rank-64 adapter (~4.1bpw+LoRA) => distillation is NOT a shortcut to beat K3-PTQ; recommend K3. K2+distill recovers REAL accuracy (not PPL-only) and is a RESCUE lever when stuck at K2 (Qwen2.5 gsm8k 0.02->0.31, Qwen3 0.01->0.38, Falcon3 0.25->0.46), but stays behind K3-PTQ; recovery is math-focused. Honest nuance: Falcon3 K2 does NOT collapse (gsm8k 0.25) -> K2 collapse is family-dependent; the K3 advantage holds anyway. Answers Adriel's P1 (no, K2+distill does not beat K3-PTQ), P3 (real acc not PPL-only, but behind K3 everywhere). Caveats: N=100, 1 seed, 300 steps.
